detailed_description: This video captures the initial 'Day 1' baseline for a Minoxidil 5% treatment journey. The subject pulls back their hair to reveal their scalp and hairline, documenting the starting condition before product application. The clip serves as a crucial 'before' visual, setting the context for potential future transformations, explicitly stating the purpose with an on-screen text overlay.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the semantic core, as it explicitly establishes the 'Day 1' starting point for using Minoxidil 5% through on-screen text and the visual act of the subject revealing their scalp. It sets the crucial 'before' state for a treatment process, which is the entire value proposition of the video's premise. There is no extraneous footage to trim in this very short, focused clip.
